words.definition: human beings in general or a group

words.definition: a piece of work or paid employment

transformations.example: He was jobless for three months.

words.definition: the earth and all its people and places

words.definition: a thought or plan formed in the mind

words.definition: the ongoing sequence of events; a measured period

words.definition: a period of twenty-four hours

words.definition: a piece of work to be done

words.definition: not interesting or exciting

words.definition: at a low temperature; not warm

words.definition: at a high temperature; very warm

words.definition: small in size or amount

words.definition: a large amount of (used with uncountable nouns)

words.definition: a small number of

words.definition: to put something into action or service

rules.description: Verb → Noun: turns verbs into nouns expressing a process or result
Adjective → Noun: forms abstract nouns from adjectives
Adjective → Adverb: creates adverbs to describe how something is done
Noun/Verb → Adjective: means 'full of' or 'having the quality of'
Verb → Noun: creates agent nouns — a person or thing that does the action
Noun/Verb → Adjective: means 'without' the quality of the root word
Verb → Noun: indicates the result or process of the action
Adjective/Verb → Opposite: adds a negative or reversing meaning
Verb → Verb: means to do the action again
Verb → Adjective: means 'capable of being done'
Noun/Adjective → Verb: means to make or turn into
Noun → Adjective: means 'full of' or 'having the nature of'
Verb/Noun → Adjective: describes a tendency to do something
Adjective → Noun: forms abstract nouns from adjectives
